caption: An older woman with short gray hair and glasses sits at a desk in an office setting. She wears a bright red button-up blouse and gold hoop earrings. In the background, a window shows greenery, and to her right is a tan metal filing cabinet topped with stacks of papers and several bottles. A flag with a blue and red design is partially visible behind her. On her desk are various papers, folders, and a laptop. Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking and gesturing. She begins by looking to her left with her right hand raised and open, then transitions to looking forward with a smile. Finally, she continues speaking, moving her right hand again in a gesturing motion toward the side of the frame. The camera remains stationary, focusing on her from the waist up as she interacts with someone off-screen.
